Emily Johnson
San Francisco, CA

Summary
Enthusiastic customer service representative with over 3 years of experience in retail environments. Adept at managing customer inquiries and providing exceptional service. Seeking to leverage strong communication skills and a desire to learn in a new role.

Experience

Retail Solutions, San Francisco, CA  
June 2020 - Present  
- Assisted customers with product selections and inquiries, ensuring a positive shopping experience.
- Managed cash register operations and handled transactions efficiently.
- Collaborated with team members to maintain store organization and cleanliness.

Gadget World, San Francisco, CA  
January 2018 - May 2020  
- Provided technical support to customers purchasing electronic devices.
- Trained new staff on customer service protocols and product information.
- Conducted inventory checks and assisted in restocking merchandise.
